themes.name: [Critical] App Inefficiency & Losses

quotes.text: If Groww cannot execute orders at the correct price and repeatedly hits the wrong target, how are traders supposed to trust the platform for professional trading in Nifty 50 F&O?
I am very disappointed with Groww. The platform charges high fees on almost every transaction, whether the investment amount is small or large.
Who is doing your PR ??? 10-12 apps she has and she is asking for grow spell lolz .... so annoying.
Much time technical problem and many order failed from groww ends and loss taken by customer.
Groww is a scam company. It tells they charges 20rs or 0.1% of trade value, whichever is lower. But they charges more than 83rs in just 2 trade.
I want to share my personal experience with Groww. I have been trading for a while and despite doing proper analysis before entering trades, I consistently end up in losses.
Groww is very bad and irritated app because i trade and app is not working properly slowly and hang very big bug not exit very early and much issues now i wil losses make to this app is bug

themes.description: Users consistently report issues with app functionality, such as crashes, incorrect order execution, high brokerage fees, and poor customer support, resulting in financial losses.
themes.business_impact: High risk of user churn, damage to brand reputation, and potential financial losses for investors.
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: The app's technical infrastructure and customer support may not be able to handle the increased demand for real-time trading and transactions, leading to inefficiencies and financial losses.
themes.action_plan:
• Improve the app's technical infrastructure, enhance customer support, and reduce brokerage fees to prevent issues and financial losses. |
   Conduct thorough testing and quality assurance of new features before releasing them to prevent crashes and errors. |
   Develop and implement a robust system for resolving customer complaints and issues in a timely and efficient manner.

themes.name: [Negative] App Freezes and Crashes

quotes.text: app.is hang so much and after 3:30 app run smooth can developer explain about this
I have some issues in... exit my trade ..I can't exit it...so please ensure the bug
lagging during Indraday trade many times
when ever I sell showing different value it's being 3 time in a single day.. I got losses due to it
too much hanging problem during the trade.its really pathetic. i have lost many time thousands of rupees
App crashed. Error:Failed to load data. Unable to see or do anything just before market close.
server down. failed to trade today for 1 hour. failed to add money
again today I am Unable to buy or sell share ,and I have loss ammount

themes.description: Users experience freezing and crashing issues during trading, making it difficult or impossible to place orders, exit trades, or view real-time data.
themes.business_impact: Users may experience significant financial losses due to delayed or cancelled trades, as well as frustration and potential long-term damage to the app's reputation.
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: Insufficient testing and validation of new features, poor scalability of the app's infrastructure, or inadequate handling of edge cases may be contributing to these freezing and crashing issues.
themes.action_plan: • Investigate and fix the root causes of the freezing and crashing issues, implement robust error handling and recovery mechanisms, and prioritize improvements to the app's scalability and performance.

themes.name: [Negative] Inconsistent and Cluttered Interface

quotes.text: New view of the upper bar showing the index is not pleasant, the earlier one was better.
After lastest index is showing not user friendly.

very weird UI of new update not able see clearly the Nifty & sensex in one go always need to click to see % , previous one more better to get in one go, please go back to previous one , ASAP else need to switch to another app.
bring back previous nifty50 UI.

the old version of this app is good before this last updated. window for nifty and sensex or all indian market make too small. the old one is very good . you are requested to change in graphics to maximize the new little window reflecting market
I don't like the current way of showing income and profit of companies , please update back to the previous design.

Earlier, the UI was much simpler and more user-friendly. It allowed users to track market movements in both points and percentage simultaneously, making it easy to understand performance at a glance. The recent redesign has worsened the experience.

the new app design is really a downgrade from previous one. when I open app I don't just want to see numbers about current market trend I want to see it by percentage as well. I want to see by how many percentage the market is up or down. please bring that back please...
Recent UI design for indices is so bad. it feels like it's non existent. Please make it bigger so that we can quickly overlook how the market is performing for the day.
font size is too small can I increase font size in groww app?

After the latest update, the commodities section has become very confusing. Prices are now shown in percentage instead of actual figures, which makes it difficult to understand real values at a glance.
The new features are third class The old features were great to know all the charts at a single time after seeing the new feature I really want to uninstall the app
The old UX and UI was clean simple and better! New UI has accessibility challenges and needs additional steps to get critical information like %High/Low of Sensex.
in my mobile I can't see nifty 50 in top. the box was cut . fix ui problem
the previous index icon was correct
please increase the font size of index prices as it was prior to update of the app
big in sclaper mode, not getting option to change index. please fix it
Please bring the old update. of the dashboard screen. Indixes like nifty sensex should show in the square card.

themes.description: Users are experiencing frustration with the new interface of the app, citing difficulties with navigation, unclear presentation of information, and cluttered design. They feel that the previous interface was better and are requesting changes to make the current version more user-friendly and intuitive.
themes.business_impact: High churn risk due to user dissatisfaction with the app's new features and design, potentially leading to loss of subscribers and revenue.
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: The new design features and layout are causing confusion and frustration among users, leading to a decrease in user engagement and satisfaction.
themes.action_plan:
• Conduct user research to identify specific pain points and areas of improvement
• Revise the design to align with user expectations and preferences
• Implement clear and concise navigation
• Provide users with options for customizing the interface to suit their needs.
